[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011101001 5
1 0000110110 4
2 1110111010 7
3 1011101111 8
4 0111111011 8
5 1011111010 7
6 1101111101 8
7 1110111111 9

23 32 1111111001 8

45 54 1111111111 a
56 65 1110111111 9 match 7
67 76 0110111111 8
70 07 0110101110 6

13 31 1011111111 9

57 75 1010101111 7

36 63 1110111011 8

61 16 1111111111 a
72 27 0111111111 9

37 73 1010111110 7
